nasb.text: and make atonement for the holy sanctuary, and he shall make atonement for the tent of meeting and for the altar. He shall also make atonement for the priests and for all the people of the assembly.

esv.text: He shall make atonement for the holy sanctuary, and he shall make atonement for the tent of meeting and for the altar, and he shall make atonement for the priests and for all the people of the assembly.

cnv.text: 他要為至聖所贖罪，又為會幕和祭壇贖罪，以及為祭司們和全體會眾贖罪。

ccb.text: 为至圣所、会幕和祭坛赎罪，也要为祭司和全体会众赎罪。
